body_txt: This is when a character or group is easily amused by a game, pastime, or hobby that would normally be considered boring and lame. It is usually used to show that these characters are immature, dull, weird, or have no exposure to real fun — or sometimes just because it's funny . A Subtrope of Indubitably Uninteresting Individual . Compare A Good, Old-Fashioned Paint Watching , Bad Taste Call-Out , Only One Finds It Fun , Plain Palate , the Museum of Boredom , The Compliance Game , and Boring Vacation Slideshow . Related to Nerds Love Tough Schoolwork and Paperworkaholic . Characters that often fall into this trope are The Ditz and the Cloudcuckoolander . Truth in Television , of course, as people are very much known to find enjoyment in things that aren't strictly meant for entertainment. See Fun for Some for more on that. Not to be confused with the redirect for Pun , "Incredibly Lame Pun". Nor should it be confused with The Other Wiki . Compare Mundane Object Amazement .
